meaning: n.瘤胃(反刍动物的第一胃)
examples: Only when it has been chewed up and digested almost to a liquid can the food pass through the rumen and on through the gut.
Bacteroidertes, Firmicutes, Spirochaetes, and Fibrobacteres were the most abundant in rumen under phyla level.
Goats use rumen, reticulum and omasum to digest silage.
This March it was the turn of the Bulgarian interior minister, Rumen Petkov, to lose his job, this time under heavy pressure from Brussels.
